deferredOrBlockedItems.reason: Raw Quran, translation, tafsir, and hadith text bodies are intentionally not exported by the CP26 prototype snapshot.

deferredOrBlockedItems.reason: Public release remains blocked. Mapper outputs must keep all public-safe graph, edge, vault, and snapshot counts at zero.

publicBoundary.message: CP27-G02 mapper outputs are private-only. Public release remains blocked.
